subject: Ratify packet-first graph workflow as P0
body: Please ratify the packet-first graph review workflow as P0. Current accepted state: builder mechanism works, graph packet content exists, packet_count=1, visible_nodes=215, visible_edges=1644, anomalies include conflicted_nodes_present and many_unverified_nodes, website-section-index is present, and AGENT_WEB_REVIEW_BRIEF.md plus GRAPH_PACKET_AGENT_DEPLOYMENT.md define the review surface. Priority order: 1. Ratify packet-first workflow as P0. 2. Library runs packet field verification and contradictionCount known-bug check. 3. Library regenerates a fresh 4-repo snapshot. 4. Packets are regenerated from the fresh snapshot. 5. per_repo coverage and website-section review state are re-evaluated. Notes: the per_repo gap is real and should be treated as the main next data-quality issue; the stale April 30 snapshot should be replaced but should not block workflow ratification; packet-first workflow should remain the default review surface while regeneration is in progress.
